name: vscode-kie-chat-provider
description: Add built-in KIE chat models and custom OpenAI-compatible models to the Copilot chat model picker.

kieChatProvider.includeBuiltInKieModels.description: Enable the built-in KIE chat model catalog from the official KIE market docs.

kieChatProvider.disabledBuiltInModelIds.markdownDescription: Optional list of built-in model ids to hide from the picker, for example `gpt-5-4` or `claude-haiku-4-5`.

kieChatProvider.models.markdownDescription: Custom multi-model configuration. Entries in this array are added on top of the built-in KIE catalog. If a custom entry uses the same `id` as a built-in model, the custom entry overrides that built-in definition.

id.description: Unique model id within this extension provider.

displayName.description: Model name shown in the Copilot model picker.

endpoint.description: Full HTTPS endpoint for the selected protocol.

protocol.description: Upstream API protocol. Use openai-chat for chat/completions, openai-responses for responses-style APIs, claude for /v1/messages, and gemini for streamGenerateContent.

requestModel.description: Model name sent in the JSON body when the chosen protocol expects a model field or when sendModelInBody is enabled. Defaults to id.

family.description: Family metadata shown in the language models editor.

vendorVersion.description: Version metadata displayed for the contributed model.

tooltip.description: Optional tooltip shown when hovering the model.

detail.description: Optional detail text shown next to the model.

enableVision.description: Advertise image input support in the model picker.

enableTools.description: Advertise tool-calling support and pass VS Code tools through as OpenAI-style functions.

stream.description: Send stream=true and treat SSE responses as incremental output.

sendModelInBody.description: For openai-chat models, send requestModel in the JSON body as model. Other protocols may still send their model field when required.

apiKeySecretKey.description: Secret storage key used for this model. Defaults to kieChatProvider.defaultApiKeySecretKey.

authHeader.description: Header name used for auth, for example Authorization or x-api-key.

authScheme.description: Prefix added before the stored secret value. Use an empty string for raw api-key headers.

extraHeaders.description: Extra headers attached to every upstream call for this model.

extraBody.description: Extra JSON fields merged into the upstream request body.

kieChatProvider.defaultApiKeySecretKey.description: Default secret storage key used by model entries that do not provide apiKeySecretKey.

kieChatProvider.endpoint.markdownDescription: Legacy single-model fallback. Used only when built-in KIE models are disabled and `kieChatProvider.models` is empty.

kieChatProvider.modelId.markdownDescription: Legacy single-model fallback. Used as the picker id and as the request body model when `sendModelInBody` is enabled.

kieChatProvider.maxInputTokens.description: Legacy single-model fallback max input token count.

kieChatProvider.maxOutputTokens.description: Legacy single-model fallback max output token count.

kieChatProvider.enableVision.description: Legacy single-model fallback for image input support.

kieChatProvider.enableTools.description: Legacy single-model fallback for tool-calling support.

kieChatProvider.includeThoughts.description: Legacy single-model fallback. Adds include_thoughts=true to the request body.

kieChatProvider.reasoningEffort.description: Legacy single-model fallback. Adds reasoning_effort to the request body.

kieChatProvider.sendModelInBody.description: Legacy single-model fallback. Sends modelId in the request body.
